notes: Baseline for harness-engineering repo. Tracks counts of distributed assets and asset-level metrics.
_qa_note_t12: T-12 (v0.44.0): bash QA — test_harness_upgrade_bash 79->89, test_init_bash_no_python3 276->278. Operator PS run 2026-06-21 (PS denied to agents) confirmed ALL drivers green AND caught two real PS-only defects symmetry missed: (1) a never-taken bash `else` branch with a broken double-quote concat -> ParserError (every .ps1 carrying it failed to load); (2) Get-ResilientCmd param `$isWindows` collided with the read-only automatic `$IsWindows` -> threw on first call, leaving upgrade/migrate runtime-broken on Windows. Both fixed (single-quote PS literal + `$forWin` rename; repo + templates/common twins). PS re-run green: verify_all 32/0/0, test-init 316/0, test-real-project 90/0, test-harness-upgrade exit 0 (all fixtures incl Fixture Z). test_init_ps 314->316. test_harness_upgrade_ps 80->89 (static Assert count; M3 read-only probe enforced on Windows + Fixture Z guard present => no skip; corroborated by the operator exit-0 all-pass run).
